data.body: Partial fix: added SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md and overlay-calibration-baselines.md to exclusion list (docs with intentionally hardcoded paths). 5 remaining failures are in skill files (fix-bug/SKILL.md: 2 refs, onboarding/SKILL.md: 3 refs) using $REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/ pattern. These require skill file edits — deferred per user request.
